title: Stackable Totems (up to 64)
description: Allows you to stack totems up to 64
body:
# Stackable Totems of Undying

## Description

**Stackable Totems of Undying** is a simple tweak mod for Minecraft Forge 1.20.1 that allows Totems of Undying to stack up to 64. No more wasting inventory space on single totems—now you can carry a full stack and use them one by one.

### How It Works (for the user)

- Totems of Undying now stack up to 64, just like most other items.
- When you are holding a stack of totems and would die, one totem is consumed from the stack (decreasing the count by 1), and you are saved as usual.
- The totem's functionality remains unchanged; only the stack size is increased.

### Features

- Totems stack to 64.
- Works exactly as expected: using a totem reduces the stack count.
